news.headline: Attune Insurance wins 2 Stevie Awards for Sales & Customer Service due to customer-first approach and innovation.
news.summary: Attune, a leading modern insurance platform catered to small businesses, was recently acknowledged by judges for its customer-centric focus and innovative practices within the insurance sector. The accolades came in the form of two prestigious Stevie Awards during the 19th annual Sales & Customer Service ceremony held in New York on April 2, 2025. This recognition highlights Attune's commitment to enhancing the insurance experience for its clients and solidifies its position as a trailblazer in the industry.

news.headline: D.A. Davidson advises Cerberus on buying Votaw Precision Technologies, a space & defense hardware provider.
news.summary: D.A. Davidson recently acted as the sole financial advisor to Cerberus Capital Management in the acquisition deal of Votaw Precision Technologies. Votaw, a prominent supplier of precision components and highly engineered spaceflight & defense hardware, was acquired by Cerberus' affiliates. This strategic partnership falls under Cerberus' Supply Chain and Strategic Opportunities platform, which focuses on investing in enterprises catering to vital national needs. This deal underscores Cerberus' continued interest in expanding its portfolio into crucial sectors.

news.headline: Blockchain initiatives vie for 23andMe's 15M user data after bankruptcy, raising privacy concerns and offering decentralized alternatives.
news.summary: DNA testing firm 23andMe has declared bankruptcy, putting its 15 million users' genomic data up for sale. The company's CEO stepped down following the announcement, prompting concern among users who are now trying to delete their data. Privacy advocates advise users to retrieve and delete their data as soon as possible. There are concerns surrounding the sale of the data, with the possibility of it ending up on the blockchain. 23andMe, known for selling genetic data to pharmaceutical companies, had a strong privacy policy, though data leaks and potential risks of misuse have been raised. Blockchain projects are now offering alternatives for users to securely store their genetic data. However, challenges such as cost, privacy, and regulatory issues remain. Despite blockchain's advantages, it may not be the ultimate solution for everyone. The main message advocates stress is to safeguard and control your genetic data, emphasizing caution in entrusting it solely to 23andMe.

news.headline: MANSCAPED partners with NASCAR driver Josh Bilicki to support Testicular Cancer Society at the Food City 500 with unique branding.
news.summary: SAN DIEGO-- MANSCAPED®, a leading men’s grooming company, has announced a partnership with NASCAR driver Josh Bilicki to support the Testicular Cancer Society (TCS) and raise awareness about the disease. This collaboration will be showcased during the Food City 500 at Bristol Motor Speedway, where Bilicki's Ford Mustang Dark Horse will feature the branding of TCS. The NASCAR Cup Series team Garage 66 will display this new partnership that aims to bring attention to testicular cancer. This initiative seeks to educate fans and competitors about the importance of early detection and prevention of this disease.

news.headline: Northern Trust launches Family Office Solutions, providing customized services for ultra-high-net-worth families without requiring a standalone office. Serving 30% of Forbes 400 list.
news.summary: Northern Trust Wealth Management based in Chicago has announced the launch of Family Office Solutions, a new service tailored for ultra-high-net-worth families. This offering aims to provide customized financial and wealth management services without the need for a separate office. Northern Trust's track record of catering to affluent individuals includes serving 30 percent of the Forbes 400 list of wealthiest individuals. This expansion underscores the company's commitment to meeting the needs of high-net-worth clients through innovative solutions.

news.headline: T-Mobile offers over $1000 for switching to Home Internet with new 5G deals. Up to $1050 rewards starting April 3.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (NASDAQ: TMUS) has introduced new offers for 5G Home Internet, aiming to facilitate a seamless transition for customers looking for a change this spring. The announcement highlights the opportunity to receive benefits up to $1,050 when switching to T-Mobile Home Internet. Starting April 3, for a limited period, individuals have the chance to claim a $300 virtual Mastercard by opting for All-In Internet or a $200 virtual Mastercard by selecting Ampli. These offerings are designed to provide a fresh start during moving season or any suitable occasion, combining ease and affordability for interested consumers.

news.summary: Brightview Senior Living, headquartered in Baltimore, has been ranked among the top 100 companies for the third time. The senior living developer, owner, and operator has close to 50 communities spanning the East Coast. They have been recognized for their commitment to being a great place to work and a great place to live.

news.headline: ECB's Holzmann: Rates are at neutral level, there is no reason to become accommodative.
BitFuFu's revenue grew 63% to $463.3 million in 2024, with net profit surging more than fivefold to $54 million.
news.summary: BitFuFu Inc., a provider of digital asset mining services, saw significant growth in its revenue and profits in 2024. Their revenue increased by 63% to $463.3 million, while their annual net profit surged more than fivefold to $54 million. The company is benefiting from the current cryptocurrency boom, with bitcoin's price rising over 30% in the last six months. BitFuFu is expanding its mining operation to further improve profitability and capitalize on the booming market. The company's success is attributed to the overall favorable market conditions and their own bitcoin mining business, which directly benefits from the increase in bitcoin prices. Such movements in the crypto market closely impact the performance of crypto-related service providers like BitFuFu. Their strong financial results are reflective of the positive trends in the digital asset industry.

news.summary: The latest gaming console from the company will feature Mario Kart World as one of its debut games. The company disclosed information about the console's technical enhancements alongside this announcement.

H&R Block contest promotes legitimacy among millions of gig workers as new 1099-K threshold affects many side hustlers.
news.summary: The recent increase in the 1099-K earning threshold has put numerous side hustlers, gig workers, and casual sellers into the category of small business owners. This change impacts individuals who earn above [specific number] through platforms like Uber, Etsy, and others, requiring them to adhere to the tax obligations and regulations applicable to small businesses. This shift has significant implications for [number] individuals who will now need to navigate the complexities of operating as a small business and managing their finances accordingly.

With a robust background spanning more than twenty years in business development within the payer and provider sectors, Scott has demonstrated expertise in spearheading organizations and sales teams to navigate new market avenues and develop customer initiatives that drive enhanced health outcomes at reduced expenses. This strategic move is anticipated to bring unparalleled insights to the company’s operations and future growth prospects.

news.headline: Growth in lithium-ion UPS market for data centers as operators shift to energy-efficient solutions. Market forecasted for 2025-2035.
news.summary: A recent report titled "Lithium-Ion UPS Market for Data Center - A Global and Regional Analysis: Focus on Product, Application, and Region - Analysis and Forecast, 2025-2035" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Lithium-Ion UPS in data centers is witnessing notable expansion due to a shift from conventional lead-acid setups to modern, lighter, and more energy-efficient alternatives. In 2025, there was a rise in adoption by large-scale hyperscale operators.

JETSET Pilates, a prominent Reformer Pilates franchise acclaimed for its specially curated music and comprehensive workouts, is bolstering its leadership with the addition of four crucial individuals. news.summary: On March 28, 2025, in Dover, Delaware, Lomond Therapeutics Holdings, Inc., a biotechnology company in its clinical stage, focuses on finding and creating top-tier and pioneering medicines for hematological malignancies.

news.headline: Javier Loya shifts focus to energy sector, becomes chairman of GETCHOICE! after OTC Global Holdings acquisition. Expands philanthropic efforts.
news.summary: Renowned entrepreneur, Enrique Javier Loya, has transitioned to the energy sector as Chairman of GETCHOICE!, based in Houston. With a successful track record spanning nearly twenty years at OTC Global Holdings (OTCGH), Loya now spearheads efforts at GETCHOICE! As of April 2, 2025, he leads the company in its strategic growth and development. Simultaneously, Loya has also expanded his philanthropic and community initiatives in the region. Over the years, he has demonstrated expertise in the business world, and now applies his skills to navigate the energy industry landscape, bringing valuable experience to his new role.

news.summary: In NASSAU, The Bahamas, starting this week, The Bahamas Grid Company (BGC) will spearhead a significant transformation project on New Providence. The company has revealed plans for a $130 million investment to upgrade the grid system, marking a major step towards modernization.

news.summary: A new strategic partnership has been announced to integrate AI-powered threat detection and biometric security technologies. This collaboration aims to enhance access control in mission-specific security operations globally. The partnership will bring together advanced AI capabilities for threat detection with robust biometric security measures to strengthen access control systems. This integration is set to positively impact security operations worldwide, offering enhanced protection against threats. This alliance underscores the importance of leveraging cutting-edge technologies to bolster security measures.

news.headline: Pilot Photonics introduces nano-iTLA for Pluggable Transceivers in C-band & O-band. Fastest tech.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in San Francisco, a leader in photonic integrated circuits and advanced laser sources, Pilot Photonics, revealed the launch of its nano Integrable Tunable Laser Assembly (nano-iTLA). This nano-iTLA module is built on the world's quickest platform for integrating tunable laser sources.

news.headline: Shokz named Official Headphone Partner of IRONMAN North America Series, will be at five events to meet athletes.
news.summary: The company Shokz, known for its innovative open-ear audio technology, has recently been revealed as the Official Headphone Partner of the IRONMAN North America Series. Shokz will have a presence at IRONMAN village during five events throughout North America. The partnership was announced in Austin, Texas on April 2, 2025.

news.headline: In Q1 2025, Tesla produced 362,000 vehicles, delivered 336,000 vehicles, and deployed 10.4 GWh of energy storage products.
news.summary: Located in Austin, Texas, in the first quarter of the fiscal year, the company successfully manufactured more than 362,000 vehicles and delivered over 336,000 vehicles to customers. Additionally, they deployed an impressive 10.4 gigawatt-hours (GWh) of energy storage products. Despite facing challenges due to the transition of Model Y lines in all four factories, resulting in a temporary loss of production weeks, they are pleased with the progress of the ramp-up of the New Model Y. The company attributes this success to the collective efforts of their customers, employees, suppliers, shareholders, and supporters. These achievements in Q1 of 2025 highlight the company's significant production and delivery capabilities.

news.headline: Tiger Pistol launches new playbook 'From Roadblocks to Revenue' to help marketing resellers increase revenue by streamlining operations.

news.headline: $2B lost to crypto hacks in Q1 2025, $1.63B from access control flaws. Bybit hack led to $1.4B loss. Scams hit $396.37M.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2025, over $2 billion was lost to cryptocurrency hacks, with nearly $1.63 billion lost to access control exploits alone. The hack on the crypto exchange Bybit, orchestrated by North Korean state actors, led to a total loss of $1.4 billion. This significantly impacted the quarter's figures, considering the total loss in 2024 was $2.25 billion. The Hacken report emphasized the need for robust security measures across all infrastructure. The quarter also saw losses attributed to phishing scams ($96.37 million) and rug pulls ($300 million). There is a concerning trend of professionalization in crypto scams, with criminal networks operating with startup-like efficiency. Additionally, platforms like Huione Pay are utilized for multi-stage laundering schemes. Most pig butchering scams originate from Southeast Asian cybercrime compounds and involve human trafficked young people from various countries.

Masimo to present at 24th Annual Needham Virtual Healthcare Conference on April 9, 2025, 2:15 pm ET. Live webcast on website.

The management team will be participating. The event will be broadcasted live on Masimo's website, www.masimo.com. A post-conference replay will also be made available. Masimo, listed as NASDAQ: MASI, is a worldwide medical technology enterprise specializing in the development and manufacturing of a broad range of healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Adobe launches Generative Extend in Premiere Pro, using AI to quickly generate and extend video & audio clips. AI-powered Media Intelligence helps find clips in large amounts of footage in seconds. Safe for commercial use.
news.summary: Adobe (Nasdaq: ADBE) has introduced Generative Extend in Premiere Pro, utilizing AI technology to instantly expand video and audio clips. This feature, powered by the Firefly Video Model and deemed safe for commercial applications, allows editors to elongate content in 4K resolution and various orientations. Additionally, Adobe launched AI-powered Media Intelligence to facilitate quick searches for specific clips within massive amounts of footage. The innovative tools aim to streamline the editing process and enhance efficiency for users.

news.headline: Informatica (NYSE: INFA) launches new AI-driven data management tools to boost AI adoption & enhance data access.
news.summary: Informatica, a leader in AI-powered enterprise cloud data management, unveiled new data management innovations aimed at facilitating access to AI-ready data across enterprises. These advancements, which leverage the CLAIRE® AI engine, are featured in the Intelligent Data Management Cloud™ (IDMC). They are designed to streamline the process of making data relevant, responsible, and robust, thereby enabling organizations to pursue AI projects with increased assurance and ease.

news.headline: Object First introduces three new Ootbi appliances (20TB, 40TB, 432TB), providing immutable backup storage for capacities up to 7PB.
news.summary: In Beverly, Mass., Object First, the company behind Ootbi (Out-of-the-Box-Immutability) introduced three new Ootbi appliances. These appliances come in capacities of 20 TB, 40 TB, and 432 TB. Organizations of various sizes, from small businesses to large enterprises, can utilize Ootbi's ransomware-proof backup storage for data resilience needs, ranging from 20 TB to 7 PB. Additionally, recent firmware updates bring a 20% increase in performance.
